specFidelityNotes: Diff c1c4af7c..c8af4f97 (#466). backfill_revenue_partition implements one-day revenue bucket E2E: skip when (shop,revenue,date) complete; budget record_attempt/success/failure around A-36 get_shop_performance (single-day window) and A-37 get_shop_performance_per_hour; customers from A-37 overall with hourly-sum fallback (commented); upsert via transform_for_channel to analytics_performance_intervals; mark_complete only after upsert; TikTokAPIError/100005 leaves partition failed. derive_aov helper; GMV persisted not Net Revenue; Section B read-only APIs only. Six pytest cases pass with sanitized fixtures; shared slice-routing/EXECUTION meta in commit for CI only.

convention_notes.note: Public API backfill_revenue_partition documented with status literals per module authority pattern.
